extension.news:
1.24.4 (2026-04-04)
Bug Fixes
- subsplease: gray out not yet available shows (38e7ea4)
1.24.3 (2026-04-04)
Bug Fixes
- subsplease: don’t error on empty shows (ff52762)
1.24.2 (2026-04-03)
Bug Fixes
- do not set watched on errors (e681f57)
1.24.1 (2026-04-03)
Bug Fixes
- more specific resolve errors (9de797f)
1.24.0 (2026-01-18)
Features
- add cache busting to artwork (16ee46c)
Bug Fixes
- subsplease: ignore v2 in unfinished checks (fae1201)
1.23.2 (2026-01-16)
Bug Fixes
- handle special characters in filenames (2b8b8f1)
1.23.1 (2025-09-22)
Bug Fixes
- subsplease: error when checking unfinished (c9de528)
1.23.0 (2025-05-21)
Features
- add ‘Play’ option to context menus (#61) (1b69cb7)
1.22.0 (2024-09-06)
Features
- update mona url (1fcaf5f)
1.21.2 (2024-07-26)
Bug Fixes

1.21.1 (2024-05-26)
Bug Fixes
- add debug logging (3528c50) - log the engine too (3b447eb)
